# ERE patterns (grep -E): lines matching these are stripped from rg snippets before AI prompts.
(^|/)ios-memory/
(^|/)\.env($|/|\.)
(^|/)secrets/
(^|/)credentials/
(^|/)\.git/
node_modules/
DerivedData/
(^|/)Pods/
(^|/)build/
\.xcworkspace/
project\.xcworkspace/
ghp_[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}
github_pat_[A-Za-z0-9_]{20,}
[A-Za-z0-9_-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Za-z]{2,}
